ddls:
CREATE TABLE "multimedia_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., video, audio) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the content file */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the content in seconds */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to the thumbnail image of the content */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the content is private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the content */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the content (for version control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being feedbacked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the user feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context or tags for the feedback */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES multimedia_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physiological_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physiological signal entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user from whom the signal was collected */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being consumed */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of physiological signal (e.g., heart rate, skin conductance) */,
  "signal_value" REAL /* Value of the physiological signal */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the signal was collected */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used to collect the signal */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartwatch, EEG headset) */,
  "signal_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the signal (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the signal was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physiological_signals_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES multimedia_content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physiological_signals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content from which the feature was extracted */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of audio feature (e.g., pitch, volume) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the audio feature */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the segment from which the feature was extracted */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the segment from which the feature was extracted */,
  "feature_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the feature extraction (e.g., high, low) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for feature extraction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES multimedia_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotion_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion label entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being labeled */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotion label (e.g., happy, sad) */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the emotion (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "labeled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who labeled the content */,
  "label_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the label was assigned */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the label (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_labels_labeled_by FOREIGN KEY ("labeled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_labels_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES multimedia_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the sentiment analysis result (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "analyzed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES multimedia_content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_analyzed_by FOREIGN KEY ("analyzed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the content */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., watch time, likes) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the engagement metric */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during engagement */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context or tags for the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES multimedia_content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotion_detection" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion detection entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being analyzed */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Detected emotion (e.g., happy, sad) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the emotion detection result (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "detected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who detected the emotion */,
  "detection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the emotion was detected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the detection (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for emotion detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_detection_detected_by FOREIGN KEY ("detected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_detection_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES multimedia_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used for the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing performance metrics of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apis" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the API */,
  "api_type" TEXT /* Type of API (e.g., social media, customer feedback) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the API was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the API */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was triggered */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user when the event was triggered */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details or context of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
